---
title: 'New Directions: A heavy burden for heavy vehicles: Increasing vehicle weight and air pollution'
date: '2006-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## New Directions: A heavy burden for heavy vehicles: Increasing vehicle weight and air pollution

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2006


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2006-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
